reason: Repository-wide spec map and pre-development routing for this compiler export task.
Ensures the manifest remains a compiler handoff artifact and does not turn tcrv.exec into compute IR.
Defines capability metadata that must participate before manifest export.
Defines tcrv.exec kernel/variant/dispatch/fallback and diagnostic metadata boundaries consumed by the exporter.
Defines plugin-owned runtime ABI and registry-local ownership rules.
Ensures target-specific meanings remain plugin-local behind generic metadata.
Defines selected variant and preference metadata semantics before export.
Primary contract for emission readiness and target/export handoff manifest.
RVV-specific expectations for unsupported/deferred emission metadata without executable claims.
Scalar fallback plugin metadata expectations when legally selected.
lit/FileCheck testing structure and evidence discipline.
